inputs.titre: Henri IV est excommunié par Grégoire VII

reason: The image depicts a scene reminiscent of a medieval interior, possibly a church or palace. The clothing and architecture appear consistent with a general medieval aesthetic. The presence of stone walls, arched windows, and candles adds to the historical feel. The style of clothing, while not perfectly precise, does not contain any glaringly modern elements. The paintings are harder to pinpoint as anachronisms. Overall, the image does well capturing the atmosphere.
